summary: Phase 3 UI Simplification - Sprint 1 testing complete. All critical issues from iteration_148 are FIXED. Agency dashboard no longer crashes (WeeklySummaryTable error resolved). ReservationsPage loads without crash. Axios response interceptor auto-unwrap fix verified working. PageErrorBoundary correctly wrapping Outlet in AppShell.

minor.issue: 400 errors in console during page loads (non-blocking, likely tenant/auth related)

critical_code_review_comments: Navigation module refactoring correctly implemented with per-persona navigation files
Axios response interceptor auto-unwrap (api.js line 212-218) correctly handles { ok, data, meta } envelope
PageErrorBoundary correctly wraps Outlet in AppShell.jsx for graceful error handling
All 7 admin sidebar sections visible: DASHBOARD, OPERASYON, REZERVASYONLAR, MÜŞTERİ & ACENTA, FİYATLANDIRMA, RAPORLAR, AYARLAR
All 7 agency sidebar sections visible: DASHBOARD, ARAMA & SATIŞ, REZERVASYONLAR, TEKLİFLER, MÜŞTERİLER, HESAP & FİNANS, DESTEK
SİSTEM & GELİŞMİŞ section correctly hidden (showInSidebar: false)
directAccessOnly items correctly hidden from sidebar but routes still accessible
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 UI Simplification Sprint 1 complete. All persona-based navigation working. Agency dashboard crash fixed via Axios envelope auto-unwrap. ErrorBoundary in place for graceful error handling.
